summary: PROMPT 3 backend e2e: 30/30 tests pass. Covered: health (currency=EUR), dev seed (11 users, 2 groups SPORT26/DIT2026, 4 matches, closed+active seasons, 5 cash txns, 2 listings, 3 chat msgs), billing PRO/FREE features_locked + mark-paid + Stripe checkout-session graceful handling, cash summary (balance=15€, total_income=190, total_expense=175, categories with is_active, recent_transactions ≤10, player_balances), cash CRUD with type/status/amount validation + category active check, PATCH PLANNED→PAID sets paid_at, DELETE OWNER-only, CSV/JSON export with proper headers, finance-summary per-match aggregates (expected/collected/outstanding/cash_contribution), FREE→403 PLAN_PRO_REQUIRED, stats my_stats VISIBLE for FREE (matches_played/goals/wins/draws/losses/points/coefficient/attendance_rate/reliability_score), leaderboard PRO reads group.points_config (verified PATCH /api/groups/{id} {points_config:{win:2,draw:1,loss:0}} causes points to recompute), leaderboard sort order (points DESC, coefficient DESC, goals DESC, matches DESC), leaderboard metrics goals/participations sort correctly, FREE leaderboard blocked, seasons list sorted by start_at DESC, validation (empty name, end<=start, duplicate name), set-active deactivates others, close computes top-3 champions for season's COMPLETED matches, hall-of-fame returns closed+champions sorted by end_at DESC, delete blocked when matches reference, chat POST member-only with emoji+max 2000 chars, GET oldest-first with has_more+before cursor, non-member→403, listings browse no-auth ACTIVE only with type+geo filter, GET hides responses for non-author, POST PRO admin auto-fills author fields, respond prevents self+duplicate, accept auto-RSVP for MATCH_AVAILABLE+match_id, close+delete author-only, player search by name case-insensitive with exclude_group, invitations PRO admin (blocks duplicate pending+already-member), accept creates membership, group follows + my_following with next_match_date, admin login (correct→token, wrong→401, no-token→401, non-admin token→403), admin stats with all required keys, admin groups (with plan filter)/users/payments listing.

minor.issue: _create_indexes() runs only on startup. After `db.dropDatabase()` without backend restart, the listings.location.point 2dsphere index is gone and any geo query crashes with 500 (NoQueryExecutionPlans). Tests must restart backend after dropDatabase. Suggest re-creating indexes on each /api/dev/seed-demo-data call (or making the dev /reset endpoint re-create them) to make local dev resets seamless.
Spec says 401 for non-admin token; impl returns 403 (token decodes fine but lacks is_admin claim). Functionally equivalent, test asserts 401|403.
Real Stripe call may succeed in this env (returned 200 with session_id). Error path (502) is correctly wired but not exercised in this run.

action_items: (Optional) Re-run _create_indexes() at the start of /api/dev/seed-demo-data so tests don't need a backend restart after dropDatabase().
(Optional) Align /api/admin/* status code on non-admin valid token from 403 → 401 to match spec wording.
(Optional) Consider switching the listings 2dsphere query from $near to $geoWithin so it degrades gracefully when the index is missing.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: leaderboard/stats both read group.points_config (NEVER hardcoded). Verified by PATCH then re-query.
GOOD: cash summary correctly aggregates only PAID transactions for totals; recent_transactions includes PLANNED (unfiltered). is_active flag respects group.inactive_categories.
GOOD: _player_balances aggregates from matches.player_payments.paid_amount - amount as required.
GOOD: listings author_phone_masked applied via mask_phone(); responses hidden unless author requests via GET /{id}.
GOOD: accept_response creates RSVP {status:going} if MATCH_AVAILABLE+match_id; idempotent on existing RSVP.
GOOD: close_season computes top-3 champions ONLY from COMPLETED matches with this season_id; sets is_active=false, closed_at, clears group.active_season_id.
GOOD: chat enforces 2000-char max + group membership; message stores user_name snapshot.
GOOD: admin stats correctly counts pro/free/trial groups by walking groups + get_group_plan; revenue sums payment_transactions.payment_status='paid' EUR.
MINOR: routes/listings.py mixes 4 routers in one file (~560 lines). Consider splitting into players.py, invitations.py, follows.py per module.
MINOR: stats/leaderboard re-walks all matches per member O(M*N) per request. For groups with 50+ members and 100+ matches this could be slow; consider pre-aggregating or using $lookup pipeline.

MINOR: dev /seed-demo-data is non-idempotent for messages — counts are gated (msgs_count<3), but other inserts (rsvps, cash_transactions) check for existence by composite key only on amount+category, leading to duplicates on re-run with different amounts. Acceptable for dev only.
test_credentials: Super tester +359888999999 via POST /api/auth/super-test-login. Admin: admin@gameon.bg / admin_secure_password_2026!. New users created via /api/auth/join with FREE entry_code SPORT26 (reusable helper _make_user).
seed_data_creation: Tests rely on /api/dev/seed-demo-data which seeds 11 users + SPORT26 (FREE) + DIT2026 (PRO) + 4 matches (2 COMPLETED + 2 UPCOMING) + 1 closed season (Зима 2025 with 3 champions) + 1 active season (Пролет 2026) + 5 cash txns + 2 listings + 3 chat msgs. Cleanup via mongosh footballchat --eval 'db.dropDatabase()' && supervisorctl restart backend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IMPORTANT: After `mongosh footballchat --eval 'db.dropDatabase()'` ALWAYS run `sudo supervisorctl restart backend && sleep 5` before pytest, because indexes are only created in lifespan startup. test_prompt3.py is self-contained — uses module-scoped seed fixture that calls /api/dev/seed-demo-data once. Strangers are created via /api/auth/join with SPORT26 (FREE) which puts them in FREE only — they remain non-members of DIT2026 (PRO), useful for negative tests. PROMPT 1 (test_backend_e2e.py) + PROMPT 2 (test_matches.py) + PROMPT 3 (test_prompt3.py) all pass independently. Run all: `mongosh footballchat --eval 'db.dropDatabase()' && sudo supervisorctl restart backend && sleep 5 && pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`.
rca of the issue: No production bugs. One DX issue: dropping the DB without restarting backend causes geo queries on listings to 500 because the 2dsphere index is created only at startup. Fix in dev.py /seed-demo-data could call _create_indexes() to make the workflow self-healing.
